productDisplayName: Lakme Absolute Forever Silk Blacklast Eye Liner
description: SHADE NAMEBlacklastWHAT IT IS?Is a smudge-free, waterproof eyeliner that lasts for 8 hours in one stroke.WHAT IT DOES?The soft, creamy texture with Vitamin E moisturizes and creates an attractive hue for your eyes with a single stroke application.FEATURESThe Lakme Absolute Forever Silk Eyeliner creates metallic hues for your eyes in one strokeThe Lakme Absolute Forever Silk Eyeliner has a creamy soft textureThe Lakme Absolute Forever Silk is enriched with Vitamin E moisturizersAvailable in exciting and vibrant shadesLasts up to 8 hoursWater resistantSmudge-freeCreates metallic hues for your eyes in 1 strokeCreamy soft textureOphthalmologically testedWaterproofSmudge resistantEasy to use applicatorSubtle hint of shimmerABOUT THE COLLECTIONCrafted by backstage experts, Lakme brings to you the Lakme Absolute Forever Silk Eye Liner, from the house of Absolute. Trace your eyes with graceful, metallic shine with the Lakme Absolute Forever Silk Eyeliner.? It is a smudge-free, water-proof eye liner that lasts for 8 hours in one stroke.ABOUT THE BRANDLakme is India's No.1 color cosmetics brand offering a wide range of high-end, world-class color cosmetics and skincare products. Lakme has a vast product range specially crafted by experts for the Indian skin. The brand has also been redefining fashion in India with Lakme Fashion Week, India's premier fashion event.
